description_long: This is a retail package of Faragello Beef Frankfurter sausages, sealed in a rectangular, glossy plastic pouch. The front of the package features a vibrant red and orange design with the Faragello logo, product name in both English and Arabic, and an appetizing image of several beef frankfurters served with fries and a small cup of ketchup on a white plate. The back of the package displays nutritional information, preparation instructions, and additional branding details. The packaging appears slightly inflated, suggesting it is vacuum-sealed or filled with air for freshness. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a grocery or convenience store setting. The package is compact and lightweight, suitable for easy handling and storage.
description: A glossy, red-orange plastic pouch of Faragello Beef Frankfurter sausages with appetizing food imagery and bilingual branding. The package is compact, sealed, and designed for retail display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a photo of frankfurters with fries and ketchup on a plate.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile of the sealed package, with the front and back designs curving outward slightly.
description_view_2: The back view displays nutritional facts, preparation instructions, and additional branding, with a barcode and text in multiple languages.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim, pillow-like shape of the sealed plastic pouch.
